alert.nonDN42: Since your ASN does not start with 424242, you are currently in read-only mode. You cannot allocate an exclusive prefix or write NS/extension records.

add.title: Add Extension
add.description: Your full number will be the prefix {prefix} plus the extension suffix you enter.

rules.nameMax: Name must be at most 50 characters

personal.title: My Extensions
personal.description: Manage your exclusive extension numbers and publish them to the public phonebook.
personal.noDataHint: Click the button on the top right to add a new extension
personal.deleteConfirmText: You are deleting extension {number} ({name}). This action cannot be undone.

public.title: Public Phonebook
public.description: Browse and search all published DN42 E164 number records.
public.info: Only numbers with valid NS configured and service enabled in settings will appear here.

callback.loadingDesc: Please wait while we verify your identity.

login.description: Securely login to your console using an OIDC identity provider
login.terms:
By logging in, you agree to the e164.dn42 registry's
Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

dashboard.description: Manage your e164.dn42 resources and settings here.
dashboard.nsSettingsDesc: Configure your DNS delegation servers to manage DNS records.
dashboard.manageExtensionsDesc: Add or edit your personal phone extension records and devices.

ns.title: NS Delegation Settings
ns.description: Manage your DNS delegation so others can resolve your numbers.
ns.enableServiceDesc: When enabled, your phonebook and NS settings will be publicly accessible and your Zone will be generated.
ns.listSubtitle: At least 1 and up to 4 NS servers are allowed, supporting IPv4, IPv6, or domains (must be .dn42)

validation.required: NS server address cannot be empty
validation.invalid: Please enter a valid IP address or domain
validation.checkInputs: Please make sure all NS input fields are filled correctly

participants.title: Participants List
participants.description: Discover all ASNs participating in the DN42 E.164 project and their allocated prefixes.
